summary: Frontend testing of Coach Dashboard unification under Risk Engine v3 complete. Verified single 'Needs Attention' section from CoachInbox, no duplicates in RosterSection. Top Priority card displays highest riskScore item with CRITICAL severity. RosterSection correctly shows only 'All Clear' athletes (1) and 'Events Requiring Prep' (1). No 'Visiting Schools' or 'Offer Received' journey badges. CTA 'Open Pod' navigates correctly. Director view still works.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Exactly ONE coach-needs-attention element on page (unified from CoachInbox)
PASS: RosterSection.js simplified - no 'Needs Attention' text, no attention badges
PASS: RosterSection shows only 'All Clear' athletes (Sarah Martinez) and 'Events Requiring Prep'
PASS: Top Priority card displays highest riskScore with CRITICAL severity label
PASS: No 'Visiting Schools' or 'Offer Received' journey badges visible
PASS: Open Pod CTA navigates to /support-pods/{id}
PASS: Director Mission Control still works after coach dashboard changes
INFO: 'Needs Attention' text appears in 5 places (KPI label, subtitle, Top Priority issue desc, section header, row subtitle) - all expected, only 1 functional section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Dashboard v3 unification verified. Key test IDs: coach-mission-control, coach-inbox-section, coach-top-priority (with coach-severity-label), coach-needs-attention (single unified list), roster-section (contains toggle-all-clear but NO attention items). RosterSection.js simplified to only show All Clear + Events Prep. CoachInbox.js is sole source for attention items. 5 athletes total: 3 in inbox (Marcus Johnson - critical, 2x Olivia Anderson), 1 all clear (Sarah Martinez), 1 may vary (Lucas Rodriguez). Director view unchanged.
